llmUsageBar.command.refresh.title: LLM Usage Bar: Refresh Now
llmUsageBar.command.checkForUpdates.titl: LLM Usage Bar: Check for Updates
llmUsageBar.config.checkForUpdates: Check GitHub Releases once a day for a newer version.
llmUsageBar.config.displayFormat: Status bar display format: usage percent, a small bar gauge, or both.
llmUsageBar.config.pollIntervalSeconds: How often to fetch usage data (seconds).
llmUsageBar.config.warnThresholdPercent: Show warning color when any window reaches this usage percent.
llmUsageBar.config.errorThresholdPercent: Show error color when any window reaches this usage percent.
